message:
feat: add Ctrl+J test for newline insertion and key hints to /help

Ctrl+J (line feed) already works for newline insertion since ink treats
\n as a regular character. Added test to document this behavior, and
added key binding hints to /help output so users know about Ctrl+J.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
